Interface AnimalService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AnimalServiceImpl
public interface AnimalService
Manages animal records within the system, including registration, updates, and removal. Implementations are responsible for maintaining consistency between animal records and shelter rosters.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Animal>
    adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all animals that were adopted after the given date.
    List<Animal>
    adoptedBy(Adopter adopter)
    Returns all animals adopted by the given adopter.
    Animal
    findById(String id)
    Returns the animal with the given ID.
    List<Animal>
    getAnimalsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
    Returns all animals currently registered in the specified shelter.
    void
    register(Animal animal, Shelter shelter)
    Registers a new animal into the specified shelter.
    List<Animal>
    registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
    Returns all animals registered into the system after the given date.
    void
    remove(Animal animal)
    Removes an animal from the system and its associated shelter.
    void
    update(Animal animal)
    Updates the information of an existing animal record; the animal may be any subtype such as Dog, Cat, or Rabbit.

  • Method Details

    • register

      void register(Animal animal, Shelter shelter)
      Registers a new animal into the specified shelter. Throws an exception if the shelter is at capacity or the animal is already registered.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to register
      shelter - the shelter to assign the animal to

    • update

      void update(Animal animal)
      Updates the information of an existing animal record; the animal may be any subtype such as Dog, Cat, or Rabbit. Throws an exception if the animal is not found in the system.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal with updated information

    • remove

      void remove(Animal animal)
      Removes an animal from the system and its associated shelter. Throws an exception if the animal is not found or has a pending adoption request.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to remove

    • getAnimalsByShelter

      List<Animal> getAnimalsByShelter(Shelter shelter)
      Returns all animals currently registered in the specified shelter. Returns an empty list if the shelter has no animals.
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to query
      Returns:
      a list of animals in the shelter

    • registeredAfter

      List<Animal> registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all animals registered into the system after the given date. Returns an empty list if no animals were registered after that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of animals registered after the date

    • adoptedAfter

      List<Animal> adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all animals that were adopted after the given date. Returns an empty list if no animals were adopted after that date.
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of animals adopted after the date

    • findById

      Animal findById(String id)
      Returns the animal with the given ID. Throws an exception if no animal with that ID is found.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the animal
      Returns:
      the matching animal

    • adoptedBy

      List<Animal> adoptedBy(Adopter adopter)
      Returns all animals adopted by the given adopter. Returns an empty list if the adopter has not adopted any animals.
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to query
      Returns:
      a list of animals adopted by the adopter
